title: Paytm Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Paytm Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Paytm Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Faridabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Paytm Ventures Solutions:
Paytm Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Ventures Solutions!
